en: 130. What kinds of relevant experience do you have?
Having acquired my bachelor's degree in computer science, I joined blank as an intern.
While performing data management, I had a chance to apply my academic knowledge to the actual field of operations.
Also, I participated in finding errors in the computer system and presenting relevant reports.
After completing my internship, I joined blank.
As a staff member, I performed maintenance and repairs and assisted user education.
From such experience, I learned a certain set of practical work skills and invaluable lessons.
